wikitext.*:
[[File:ColorStudioDaFinci.jpg|thumb]]'''The Color Studio''' is the in-app [[Shops|shop]] where users can purchase [[Colors|color]] dyes for their [[birb]] using [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]]. Users can also sell back color dyes at half price to get rainbow stones. Unlike Clothing and Furniture, colors can't be gifted to friends. 

== Colors==
:''See [[Colors]] page''  
[[File:ColorItemSloths.jpg|thumb]]There are currently 235 different bottles of dye available, each of which is a specific color for a specific body part. The colors available are divided between: Headpatch (38), Cheeks (32), Beak (24), Body (36), Wings (39), Belly (32), and Feet (34). Access to color dyes is based on the birb's [[Stages of Growth|stage of growth]] (baby, toddler, child, teenager.)

=== Color Item Slots === 
The shop offers 12 color item variations at a time. Six of the slots are locked unless you have [[Finch Plus|members]]. There are no member-exclusive dyes, just how many you are offered at a time. {{Clear}}

=== 50% Off Sale Slot ===
[[File:ColorStudio50%Sloth.jpg|thumb]][[Finch Plus]] users are also offered one additional bottle of dye for 50% off every day. It's shown in a banner above Da Finci's head. {{Clear}}
=== Refresh ===
[[File:ColorStudioItemRefresh.jpg|thumb]]The entire shop refreshes automatically every day, in accordance with your birb's schedule. All 12 bottles of dye vanish and 12 new bottles will appear.
You can manually refresh the colours for sale multiple times every day, just like you can with the furniture or clothing shops. The first manual refresh is free, and the ones afterwards are respectively 10, 35, 60, 85, 110, 135 and 160 rainbow stones. 

=== Search ===
[[File:CatalogandSellButtons.jpg|thumb]]
You can try on all color variants by tapping on the word "Catalog" at the top right of the page. Dyes cannot be purchased here, only through the shop.

=== Sell ===
You can sell all bottles of dye that your birb isn't currently wearing. The ones they are currently wearing aren't saleable. At the top right of the page, next to the Catalog, there is a "money" bag with a rainbow stone on the front. Click this to sell dye bottles back to the shop. They are worth exactly half the amount (50%) that you originally paid.
